arts.ttl: Alan Shearer and Chris Sutton disagree over 'very hard' Ipswich v Everton prediction for tomorrow
arts.sum: Ipswich Town and Everton are set to lock horns in the Premier League on Saturday, with both sides desperate to pull away from the danger...

arts.ttl: Ipswich Town: 10 players to represent both the Blues and Everton
arts.oTtl: East Anglican Daily Times - Ispwich Town FC
arts.sum: Hamilton was sold to Everton for £40,000 in 1975, where he played 41 league games for the Toffees, scoring 3 goals. Marshall moved to Ipswich in 1993 for £750,000, where he went on to score 38 goals in 97 games during his spell at Portman Road.

arts.ttl: Ipswich star Axel Tuanzebe facing months out after coming 'very close' to losing his thumb
arts.sum: Axel Tuanzebe, 26, missed the 4-1 loss to West Ham following the injury and has now undergone surgery which is expected to keep him on the sidelines for an extended period

arts.ttl: Ipswich Town: Kieran McKenna on Omari Hutchinson's best position
arts.oTtl: East Anglican Daily Times - Ispwich Town FC
arts.sum: Elsewhere, Dara O'Shea played at right-back for the Republic of Ireland, while Wes Burns played on the left wing for Wales. He’s also played left centre-half for Ireland in a three, lots of right-back, lots of middle centre-back in a four, lots of right centre-back in a five, so he’s got good experience in several positions.

arts.ttl: Ipswich defender Axel Tuanzebe ruled out for months after almost losing thumb in freak accident
arts.sum: Tuanzebe has undergone surgery after a ‘household accident’ before the international break

arts.ttl: Ipswich Town: Jack Taylor on Ireland, Kalvin Phillips & Premier League
arts.oTtl: East Anglican Daily Times - Ispwich Town FC
arts.sum: Among them, he wanted to play in the Premier League and feature for the Republic of Ireland at senior level. Aside from the pride of representing Ireland at international level, Taylor also highlighted the experience of playing at the Karaiskakis Stadium in Piraeus, which is often home to one of the most intense atmospheres in Europe when Olympiacos play there.

arts.ttl: 'That's the day' - Ashley Young knows moment he will retire as Everton man explains future plans
arts.sum: The 39-year-old is still confident with his body as he continues to feature in the top flight with Everton

arts.ttl: Ipswich Town: Axel Tuanzebe and injuries update ahead of Everton visit
arts.oTtl: East Anglican Daily Times - Ispwich Town FC
arts.sum: The Blues boss said that the 26-year-old missed a 4-1 defeat at West Ham with an ‘unfortunate hand injury’, with a national report revealing that he had badly cut his thumb when breaking a glass washing up. “He’s had surgery to repair the tendons in the thumb that was damaged, I think the recovery is going pretty well, but it’s a long-term injury.

arts.sum: Our Everton jury are back to have their say ahead of the Premier League game against Ipswich Town
